instructions.en: Select the date of the publication for the information resource.

description.en: Describes the title of an Information Resource.

instructions.en: Enter the information resource's title and the type of that title.

description.en: Describes the location of an information resource. Relates to Information Resource E73 with P67

This branch describes the publication of an Information Resource.

Connects to Information Resource (E73) with -P128
Used to hold identifiers necessary to link a given resource to records in an external (perhaps legacy) system.

instructions.en: Enter information for identifiers of the resource from other external sources.

description.en: An object or substance used to record and accumulate data

instructions.en: Select the information carrier for the information resource.

description.en:
Generic branch for capturing free-form written descriptive information.
Intended to be evolution from v3 description branch from HIP 3. Created semantic description node with description string and description type hanging off of it. Description (semantic node) becomes a grouping node (type and string).  

This branch meets technical business rules for CRM compliance but CRM experts have said that this is an inappropriate implementation of E62.

Connects to all resources with P140i

instructions.en: Enter a description and description type for the resource.

description.en: Describes the creators, contributors, type, and date of a creation and/or update event of an information resource.

instructions.en: Describe the information resource  and its date of creation

description.en: This branch describes the language of an Information Resource.

instructions.en: Select language of the information resource.

description.en: Used to define legal privileges associated with an Information Resource.

instructions.en: Describe the copyright for the information resource.

description.en: This resource model defines information resources, such as images, reports, and publications.  v1
